initial_entry.name: Solve
initial_entry.author: Liam Riddell
initial_entry.description: Your Math Maestro! Real-time calculations without AI (e.g. ChatGPT) fuss. From date magic ('Now + 20 days') to arithmetic flair ('10 + 5 / (2 * 2)'), your trusted sidekick in every note. More brilliance on the way!

current_entry.name: Solve
current_entry.author: liamriddell
current_entry.description: Real-time equation and date calculations.

change_history.old_value: Your Math Maestro! Real-time calculations without AI (e.g. ChatGPT) fuss. From date magic ('Now + 20 days') to arithmetic flair ('10 + 5 / (2 * 2)'), your trusted sidekick in every note. More brilliance on the way!
